title: Router Dashboard
description: A multi-page dashboard application incorporating client-side routing and data fetching to display posts, user profiles, and tasks.

title: Minesweeper
description: A responsive, client-side implementation of the classic logic puzzle focusing on state management and zero layout shifts.

title: Color Guessing Game
description: An interactive logic game that generates randomized color palettes across multiple color spaces (RGB, Hex, HSL). Features dynamic difficulty tiering that controls grid scaling states and color generation algorithms.

title: Bookmark Landing Page
description: A high-performance landing page layout featuring pixel-perfect responsive styling, optimized asset pipelines, and semantic structure.

title: Fylo Landing Page
description: A complex, multi-themed service landing page featuring responsive multi-column layouts and validation-ready newsletter capture blocks.

title: Loopstudios Landing Page
description: A sleek digital agency landing page showcasing modern typography overlays, a dynamic responsive photo gallery grid, interactive button hover states, and structural multi-column navigation components.

title: Shortly Link Shortener
description: A clean, modern product landing page featuring structured feature grids, responsive layout components, and light JavaScript interactions for user workflows.

title: Clipboard Landing Page
description: A feature-rich corporate landing page layout showcasing structured flex and grid distributions, feature feature-utility components, responsive cross-platform layout wrappers, and styled call-to-action sections.

title: Testimonials Grid Section
description: An advanced asymmetric grid layout built to showcase intricate column and row-spanning mechanics. Focuses on robust responsive ordering, multi-colored card profiles, and background image positioning.
